untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) declining magnitude of higher highs (requires multi-bar comparison logic not supported by 3-field conditions), (2) counting of large trend bars with specific OHLC percentile criteria (requires custom bar property calculation), (3) multiple failed breakout tests above prior extremes (requires pattern recognition), (4) synchronized multi-timeframe confirmation. These require algorithmic pattern detection beyond the allowed operator set and single-indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Approximated using bar range contraction (proxy for declining bar sizes) and RSI divergence (proxy for momentum loss). However, the core signal—reluctant highs with declining increments and multiple failed breakouts—cannot be fully expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. A custom rule engine or indicator would be needed to properly implement the pattern recognition aspects of this signal.
